metadata.name: Less Party Window
metadata.description-es: Un mod que reemplaza y mejora la ventana de party con chat global, mensajes privados, perfiles de jugadores, temas de colores y mucho más
metadata.description-en: A mod that replaces and enhances the party window with global chat, private messaging, player profiles, color themes, and much more

content:
A mod that fully replaces the default party window, adding a social layer, real-time match data, global and private messaging, and deep customization options.

## Features

### Chat
- Real-time ping display during matches
- Match data: IP address and port visible in-game
- Block specific players from the current match
- Block the entire match chat

### Social
- Search for player profiles
- Add friends and manage incoming friend requests
- Set custom nicknames for friends or known players
- View player profiles: play time, trophies, and linked accounts

### Messaging
- Global chat: talk with anyone, no friend required
- Private DMs (friends only)
  - Send text messages, images, mods, and game replays
- Game invitations
  - Invite friends directly to your current match
  - Block unwanted invitations
- Change your in-game username and nickname
  - Subject to availability and allowed values

### Preferences
- Color themes: set the party window to any custom color
- Language support
  - Spanish, English, Portuguese, Russian, Hindi, Malayalam, Indonesian
